name: @yunpat/orchestrator-adapter
description: Orchestrator 适配器 - 连接 Rust 网关和 Node.js 业务层

scripts.dev:watch: cd ../.. && npx nodemon --watch packages/orchestrator-adapter/src --watch packages/orchestrator/src --watch packages/core/src --watch packages/agents --watch patents/agents --watch packages/tools --watch packages/database --ext ts,tsx,json --delay 1 --exec 'npx tsx packages/orchestrator-adapter/src/server.ts'

author: Xu Jian <xujian519@gmail.com>
